holdings.infoBox: MAKX is an equity ETF with a total of 25 individual holdings. The top holdings are Ouster stock at 7.97%, 3D Systems at 7.24%, Cognex at 5.98%, Ambiq Micro at 5.86%, and Emerson Electric Co. at 5.79%.

overview.description: The ProShares S&P Kensho Smart Factories ETF (MAKX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Kensho Smart Factories index. The fund tracks a modified equal-weighted index of US-listed firms that enable the digitalization of manufacturing. MAKX was launched on Sep 29, 2021 and is issued by ProShares.
